worldOverview.name: Valentines Survival
worldOverview.description: It's Valentine's Day! A new school rule says any chocolate you're given must be eaten on the spot — and as the most popular student, you're about to be swarmed by admirers the moment the final bell rings. Can you dodge the crowd and slip out of school before they catch you?
worldOverview.systemPrompt:
It's Valentine's Day at Ashburn High. A new school rule says chocolate recipients must eat any chocolate they are handed on the spot. The player is the most popular student, and the instant the final bell rings their classmates rush to give them Valentine's chocolates.

World Rules:
- The player must escape the school grounds while dodging eager classmates trying to hand them chocolate.
- Eating too much sugary chocolate causes a sugar overload, leaving the player queasy and sluggish and draining stamina.
- Use stamina to run, dodge, and slip past crowds; rest in quiet spots to recover.
- The game is won when the player makes it out of the school.

stats.name: Health
stats.description: Represents the player's physical well-being and ability to sustain damage

descriptors.description: Critical condition. Severely wounded, barely conscious, and at risk of death.
Injured. Suffering from multiple wounds, movement impaired, combat effectiveness reduced.
Hurt. Minor injuries present, some pain, but generally functional.
Healthy. No significant injuries, operating at full capacity.

stats.name: Stamina
stats.description: Represents the player's energy and ability to perform physical actions

descriptors.description: Exhausted. Barely able to move, risk of collapse, unable to perform strenuous actions.
Tired. Movements are sluggish, difficulty in sustained physical activities.
Winded. Slightly out of breath, can perform most actions but not at peak efficiency.
Energetic. Full of energy, capable of performing any physical action without hindrance.

stats.name: Sugar
stats.description: How much sugary chocolate the player has eaten recently. Too much causes a queasy sugar overload.

descriptors.description: Fresh. Hasn't eaten much; light on their feet.
Satisfied. Had a few chocolates, feeling fine.
Sugar high. Eaten a lot of sweets; starting to feel jittery and sluggish.
Sugar crash. Far too much chocolate; queasy and struggling to keep moving.

locations.name: Ashburn Highschool
locations.aiDescription: The player's school, where they must find a way out while dodging chocolate-wielding classmates.

entities.name: Classmate
entities.playerDescription: An eager classmate who can't wait to hand you a box of Valentine's chocolate.
entities.aiDescription: An eager classmate determined to give the player their Valentine's chocolate before they can get away.
